ab: Kaynu’, umungi ci maras cu papatas la, pakbalayq si sipkabawx ikuwing ku isu’ qu?
ch: w: Kaynu’，我忘了帶筆，你的可以借我嗎?
en: Kaynu’, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: ukas a ikuwing uwi, yani ku Pukaw ku hani.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Pukaw’s.

ab: nanu’ pakbalayq i sipkabawx kuwing cu pilapilag qu? nabuwibiwisaw mi pasayu isu’.
ch: w:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: uwal, agal ga.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: mahuway su’, mahuway su’ kusa i Pukaw uwi.
en: Thank you and thank Pukaw for me.

ab: nanuwan ku aalun?
en: May I help you?

ab: papasayu ci cku usayng ka ruwas kahani.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: uwal, paagal si cu nanuwan na’ qu?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: pakabawx ci na’ cu tugal ka ruwas kahani.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: uwal, kaa ungii pa’buwinah i makatuu’.
ch: A:好了，記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: ini’ su’ pa’buwinahi kuwing na’ ku papawng cu pinateq.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: sipa’buwinah mu cuhisa’ la.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: micuwa’ ka magaang lku papawng cu pinateq mi la?
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: ini’ su’ ka sipkabawx i Kaynu’ lga.
en: Did you lend it to Kaynu’?

ab: ini’ mu baqi, halay mi maqut hiya’.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: pakbaxanay mi su’ ku papawng cu pinatas mu han.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Pukaw, pinkabawx isu’ ni Kaynu’ ku situwing ka kehma kahani qu?
ch: M:Pukaw，這個外套是 Kaynu’ 借你的嗎?
en: Pukaw, did Kaynu’  lend you this coat?

ab: iqaat, binaynay ikuwing ni yaya’ mu.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: macka’ kinku isu’ ku situwing ka kehma ni Kaynu’.
ch: M: Kaynu’ 的外套跟你的一樣。
en: Kaynu’’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: magauu’ ku siyatu’ niya’ ka kehma, ini’ packa’ iru’ kinku ita’.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Pukaw, kumnabawx si cu pila’ ki Kaynu’ qu?
en: Pukaw, did you borrow money from Kaynu’?

ab: uwal, naki mi pinsayugan hiya’ sawni’, umungi ci maras cu pila’ la.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: nanu’ papsayugan si kanuwan?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: pasiyugay mi hiya’ i casan.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: uwal, kalanay mi su’ i hiya’.
en: Okay, I will tell Kaynu’ for you.
